control_text: Arrow Keys: Navigate/Select towers and positions | Space: Place/Upgrade tower | Z: Cancel selection | Shift: Speed up (hold) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart
description_text: Defend your mobile command center against waves of alien invaders in this tower defense survival game. Deploy and upgrade towers (Machine Gun, Flamethrower, Cannon, Plasma) along a fixed path to destroy enemies before they reach your base. Each tower can be upgraded twice for enhanced power. Manage resources wisely and survive multiple waves to win. If any enemy reaches your command center, the game is over.

control_text: Controls: ARROWS to Move • SPACE to Jump (x2) • Z to Attack (ARROWS + Z for Directional: Up, Down, Forward, Back) • SHIFT to Dash Tips: Hit an enemy to enable Dash-Cancel!
Arrow Keys/WASD: Move | Space: Shoot | E: Interact | H: Heal (100 gold) | S: Shop | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Navigate 9 levels to reach the exit! Buy weapons from the shop (S key), defeat ALL enemies to unlock exit. Multiple enemy types: Normal, Fast, Tank, Ranged.

control_text: Arrows: Move | Space: Jump | Z: Attack | Shift: Special | ESC: Pause | R: Restart

Arrow Keys: HOLD to move player continuously | Shift (Tap): Toggle sprint mode for faster movement | Space: Interact with doors, items, hiding spots | Z: Toggle flashlight (in dark levels) | Enter: Start game from title screen | Escape: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (returns to title screen)
description_text: Escape the haunted mansion while evading Ao Oni, a terrifying blue monster that stalks the halls. Navigate through 6 progressively challenging levels, each with unique layouts and puzzles. Find keys, unlock doors, and solve environmental puzzles to progress. Stay hidden in closets and behind furniture when Ao Oni is near. Break line of sight to escape chases. Complete all levels to escape the mansion and win!

control_text: Arrow Left/Right: Navigate between tubes | Space: Select tube to pour from, then select destination to pour into | Z: Undo last move | ESC: Pause/Resume game | Enter: Start game (from start screen) | R: Restart (returns to start screen from game over)
Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character | Space: Confirm upgrade selection | Shift/ESC: Pause/Unpause game | Enter: Start game from main menu | R: Restart and return to main menu
description_text: Arena Reckoning: Pixel Horde is a top-down survival auto-battler where you face endless waves of monsters across three increasingly challenging levels. Your character automatically attacks enemies while you focus on movement and strategic upgrade choices. Collect experience gems from defeated foes to level up and choose powerful upgrades. Survive timed waves, defeat mini-bosses and a final boss to claim victory. Each level ramps up difficulty with faster, stronger enemies and new threats. Master movement, make smart upgrade choices, and survive the pixel horde!

control_text: Arrow Keys: HOLD to move/aim continuously (UP/DOWN to move, LEFT/RIGHT to aim) | Space: TAP to shoot weapon | Shift (hold): Sprint mode (faster movement) | Z: TAP to reload weapon | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
description_text: Battle Royale FPS Arena: You are a soldier in a competitive arena match. Eliminate enemy soldiers to earn XP and unlock weapon upgrades. Survive waves of increasingly skilled opponents while collecting ammo and health packs. Reach level 5 to win the match! Watch your health and ammo carefully.

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move your soldier in four directions Z: Fire weapon SPACE: Sprint (faster movement with reduced accuracy) SHIFT: Take cover/crouch (reduced movement speed but improved accuracy) ENTER: Start game from title screen ESC: Pause/unpause game R: Restart game after victory or defeat

description_text: Drop balls from the top of the screen to bounce through a peg-filled board, aiming to hit multiplier gates that duplicate your balls. Each ball lands in a collection bin at the bottom, earning points based on the bin's value. Complete levels by reaching target scores within limited drops. Strategic placement and timing are key to maximizing your score through multipliers!

control_text: Arrow Left: Rotate shooter left Arrow Right: Rotate shooter right Space: Fire bubble Z: Swap current bubble with next bubble Enter: Start game (from start screen) Esc: Pause/Unpause game R: Restart (return to start screen)

Controls: Arrow Keys (←→): Select object (when not grabbed) Space: Pick up/drop object (toggle grab mode) Arrow Keys (↑↓←→): Move grabbed object position A/D: Rotate grabbed object Enter: Start game from menu Esc: Pause/unpause game R: Restart from game over screen Z: Fire cannon (when in playing phase and not editing)
description_text: Guide cannon balls into buckets by strategically positioning ramps and deflectors! Each level gives you a limited number of balls to fill all buckets. Position the movable objects carefully, then fire the cannon to watch physics do its magic. Fill every bucket with at least one ball to win and unlock the next level. Run out of balls before completing the objective, and you'll need to try again!

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move | Space: Lunge Attack | Shift: Tentacles (Large) | Z: Blood Trail (Medium+) | Enter: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: You are an amorphous creature of unknown origin, trapped in a sinister research facility. Stalk through dark corridors, consume human prey to grow stronger, and evolve devastating abilities. Reach maximum size and eliminate all humans to escape.

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move left/right, climb up/down on walls | Space: Jump (press again in air for double jump) | Z: Air dash in the direction you're moving (limited uses, recharges on landing) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
description_text: Help Madeline climb Celeste Mountain and reach the summit while overcoming challenging platforming obstacles. Jump across gaps, dash through the air, and climb walls to navigate hand-crafted levels. Avoid deadly spikes and falling into pits. Each screen presents new challenges that test your precision and timing. Collect strawberries for bonus points and to recharge your dash!

control_text: Arrow Left: Move left | Arrow Right: Move right | Arrow Up: Jump (when on ground) | ENTER: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen
description_text: You are a clever mouse on a mission to collect all the delicious cheese scattered throughout increasingly dangerous environments! Navigate through 6 challenging levels filled with patrolling cats. Collect every piece of cheese to activate the mouse hole exit, then make your escape. But beware - one touch from a cat and you'll lose a life! Master the art of timing, precision jumping, and careful planning to complete all levels and claim victory.

control_text: SPACE: Jump | ARROWS: Move | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Navigate the orb through matching colors. Avoid mismatched obstacles.

control_text: Controls: Arrow Keys to Move/Speed • ENTER to Start • ESC to Pause

TAP-BASED CONTROLS: Arrow Keys: Single tap moves cursor one cell | Space: Tap once to start path, move with arrows to build, tap again to execute | Shift: Cancel current path | Enter: Start game | Escape: Pause/unpause | R: Return to main menu
description_text: Connect Cascade is a color-matching puzzle game where you connect adjacent dots of the same color to clear them from the grid. Form squares to clear all dots of that color! Complete level objectives like clearing specific colored dots or dropping anchors to the bottom before running out of moves. Progress through 5 increasingly challenging levels that test your strategic thinking and pattern recognition.

control_text: Controls: SPACE: Click cookie | Arrow UP/DOWN: Navigate menu | Z: Purchase | SHIFT: Toggle tabs | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Welcome to Cookie Clicker! Your goal is to bake as many cookies as possible. Click the giant cookie to earn cookies manually, then spend your cookies to purchase buildings that automatically generate cookies for you. Each building type produces cookies at different rates. Unlock upgrades to boost your production and reach higher cookie counts. Can you reach 10,000 cookies to achieve ultimate victory?

control_text: ARROWS: Move/Attack | SPACE: Skip Beat | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
Controls: Arrow Keys (←→): Move between lanes | Space: Hit Red/Green notes | Z: Hit Yellow notes | Enter: Start | Esc: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Guide the growth of a mystical tree by performing musical notes with precise timing. Notes descend from above and must be hit exactly when they reach the judgment line. Hold notes appear as long green bars - press and hold SPACE when the front reaches the line, then release SPACE when the bar ends. Yellow notes require pressing Z.

control_text: Controls: Arrows to Move, Space to Shoot, ESC to Pause, R to Restart.
ARROWS: Move | SPACE: Jump/Shoot | ENTER: Start | R: Restart
description_text: Descend the well. Shoot with Gunboots. Land on enemies or shoot them. Recharge ammo on ground.

description_text: Tap to flap wings. Guide the ball through hoops to score. Don't hit the ground!

description_text: Connect all glowing dots on the grid by drawing a continuous path without lifting your finger or retracing any line segment. Each puzzle has exactly one solution - an Eulerian path that visits every connection once. Start at any dot and carefully plan your route. Complete increasingly complex puzzles to progress through all levels. Think ahead, as one wrong move can force you to restart the puzzle!

description_text: Rules are blocks. Change the rules to win.

control_text: Arrow Keys: Move your heart around the arena | Z Key: Fire love projectiles at enemies | Shift Key: Focus mode (slower movement, shows hitbox) | Space Key: Use special ability (if unlocked) | ENTER: Start game from title screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay | R: Restart game (from game over screen)
description_text: You are an alien girl trapped in a cave, surrounded by bizarre monsters. You cannot fight them directly, but you can defeat them with the power of love! Each boss has unique attack patterns that fill the screen with projectiles. Defeat bosses to earn random power-ups that strengthen your heart. Battle through multiple stages of increasingly difficult bosses, culminating in a final showdown against The Void. Can your love grow strong enough to survive, or will your heart break?

description_text: Mini Golf Madness! Navigate your ball through a challenging course filled with obstacles, ramps, and hazards. Your goal is to sink the ball into the hole in as few strokes as possible while avoiding water hazards and out-of-bounds areas. Complete all 9 holes (3 easy, 3 medium, 3 hard) to win the game!

control_text: Arrows : Move Cursor | Z : Switch Line | Space : Connect/Build | Shift+Space : Undo | ESC : Pause
description_text: Design a transit map for a growing city. Connect stations with colored lines to transport passengers. Avoid overcrowding stations to keep the city moving.

description_text: Aim and fire a chain of balls to break the descending neon bricks. Collect '+' items to increase your ball count. Don't let the bricks reach the bottom!

description_text: Bounce along the neon path. Steer Left/Right. Don't fall into the void.

description_text: Swipe your finger (use Arrow Keys) to guide a snake of balls and break the bricks. Try to break as many bricks as possible.

description_text: Ocean Hunter: Cannon Fury is an arcade shooter where you control a powerful cannon at the ocean floor, defending against waves of sea creatures. Your mission is to hunt fish across 9 challenging levels - 3 easy, 3 medium, and 3 hard levels, each with increasing difficulty. Destroy different types of fish to earn points - from small sardines to massive boss creatures like sharks and the legendary Giant Squid. Complete each level by reaching the target score before time runs out. Master your aim and timing to become the ultimate ocean hunter!

control_text: Octagon 1: Maximal Challenge Octagon 1: Maximal Challenge Human Mode Controls: ARROWS to Rotate, SPACE to Flip, R to Restart

description_text:
Explore procedurally generated dungeons in this turn-based roguelike. 
        Battle monsters, collect gold, and descend as deep as you can. 
        Every move matters - when you move, they move.

description_text: Race through increasingly challenging tracks in this top-down arcade racer! Navigate your car through traffic, avoid obstacles, and master the art of drifting. Progress through suburban streets, busy city roads, and treacherous mountain passes before facing off against the ultimate boss car. Collect cash to upgrade your vehicle's engine, acceleration, and handling. Complete each level without losing all your health to advance. Can you defeat The Enforcer and claim victory?

control_text: ARROWS: Move | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Navigate an endless procedural world. Hop across roads, rivers, and train tracks.

control_text: Arrow Keys (↑↓←→): Move plant placement cursor on lawn | Z: Switch plant selection | C: Collect falling sun (when near cursor) | Space: Place selected plant at cursor position | Shift+Space: Dig up plant | Enter: Start game from title screen | ESC: Pause/unpause game | R: Restart game (from game over screen)
description_text: Defend your lawn from waves of approaching zombies! Plant sunflowers to generate sun resources, then use sun to plant offensive units like peashooters. Zombies march down 5 lanes toward your house - if any reach the left side, you lose. Collect falling sun and strategically place plants to stop all zombies in each wave to win. Each plant has unique abilities and costs, so manage your resources wisely!

control_text: Use Arrow Keys to Tilt | Space to Charge Jump

description_text: Welcome to Pool Challenge! Your objective is simple: use the white cue ball to pocket all 15 colored balls into the holes. Aim carefully, adjust your power, and clear the table! Avoid scratching (pocketing the cue ball) as it's a foul. Progress through increasingly challenging levels to master your pool skills!

control_text: Defend the path! Use Arrow Keys to move cursor, Space to build/select towers.
description_text: Defend the path! Use Arrow Keys to move cursor, Space to build/select towers.

description_text: Welcome to Rhythm Runner! Guide your character through an endless musical highway where notes stream toward you from the right. Hit the notes with perfect timing using the arrow keys to score points and build combos. Each successful hit charges your special ability meter. Collect power-ups to unlock unique Elfin companions that boost your score multiplier. Dodge dangerous enemies that appear on the lanes. Miss too many notes or hit enemies and it's game over!

description_text: Navigate through a dark, atmospheric world as a young boy searching for his lost sister. Solve environmental puzzles, avoid deadly traps, and overcome platforming challenges. Push crates to reach higher ground, activate levers to open paths, and use your wits to survive the hazardous environment. Death is part of learning—each failure teaches you how to progress. Reach the final checkpoint to complete your journey.

control_text: Arrow Keys: HOLD to move ninja continuously (Up/Down/Left/Right) | Space: TAP for context action - Silent takedown (near enemy) / Use vent (on vent) / Detonate barrel (near barrel) | Enter: Start game from main menu | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (return to main menu)
description_text: You are a master ninja assassin infiltrating enemy territory. Your mission: eliminate all primary targets marked in red while avoiding detection by patrolling guards. Use the shadows to your advantage, time your movements carefully, and utilize environmental tools like vents for quick escapes and explosive barrels for strategic eliminations. One mistake means mission failure—stay hidden, stay silent, and complete your objectives to become the ultimate Shadow Takedown master.

control_text: Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and select sauces (Up: Garlic Sauce, Down: Tahini Sauce) | Z: Add Meat | Space: Serve Order | ENTER: Start Game / Confirm | ESC: Pause / Unpause | R: Restart (from Game Over screen) | Shift: Quick pause toggle during gameplay

Arrow Left/Right: Turn your snake left or right | Space or Shift: Activate speed boost (costs mass) | Enter: Start game or confirm menu selections | Escape: Pause/unpause game | R: Return to main menu from game over screen
description_text: Guide your snake through three challenging levels, consuming glowing pellets and defeating AI opponents to grow longer. The arena wraps around like Pac-Man—go off one edge and appear on the opposite side! Avoid collisions with obstacles and other snakes. Reach the target length for each level to advance. Use your boost strategically to escape danger or chase opponents, but be careful—it costs you mass! Defeat AI snakes by making them crash into your body, then collect their remains to grow even larger.

control_text: W: Move Up | A: Move Left | S: Move Down | D: Move Right | Shift: Dash (quick speed boost with cooldown) | Space: Confirm selection in menus | Enter: Start game from menu | Escape: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart (return to menu from game over)
description_text: You are a brave potato survivor fighting waves of vegetable enemies! Your weapon auto-fires at the nearest threat. Survive increasingly difficult waves across 3 levels, collect experience to level up and gain powerful stat boosts, gather materials to purchase upgrades between levels, and defeat the final boss to claim victory. Stay mobile, manage your health, and become the ultimate Spud Survivor!

control_text: Stack the blocks as high as you can! Press SPACE to place the block. Align it perfectly to keep the tower wide.
description_text: Stack the blocks as high as you can! Press SPACE to place the block. Align it perfectly to keep the tower wide.

description_text: Guide falling sugar particles into cups by drawing curved barrier lines! Each level requires you to fill all cups to their target amounts. Sugar falls from spawners and bounces off your drawn lines. Watch out for special elements: color filters change sugar colors, gravity switches flip the flow direction, and teleporters instantly transport particles. Plan your barriers carefully to direct the right amount of sugar into each cup. Complete all requirements to advance through increasingly challenging puzzles!

control_text: W: Match Star (Yellow) | A: Match Circle (Red) | S: Match Square (Blue) | D: Match Triangle (Green) | ENTER: Start Game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to Menu
description_text: Match falling geometric symbols by pressing the correct key when they reach the hit zone at the bottom of the screen. Progress through 5 challenging levels, each requiring 15 correct matches. Watch your misses - exceed the limit and it's game over! Build combos for bonus points and aim for the high score.

control_text: Arrow Left/Right: HOLD to smoothly rotate aiming direction | Space: Throw knife in aimed direction | Enter: Start game from menu | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart and return to start screen
description_text: You are a skilled throwing agent tasked with eliminating hostile enemies while protecting innocent hostages. Aim carefully and throw knives to take down enemies before they reach the hostages. Use exploding barrels to damage multiple enemies at once, and break wooden boxes to stun nearby foes. Complete all 5 levels by eliminating every enemy while keeping all hostages safe. Strategic thinking and precise aim are key to success!

description_text: Tone Sphere is a rhythm-based music game where musical notes emerge from the depths of space and travel toward the center target zone. Your goal is to hit notes with precise timing as they reach the target ring. Three types of notes appear: blue circles (tap Space), gold stars (tap Z), and purple circles (tap Shift). Maintain your health by hitting notes accurately—misses drain health while perfect hits restore it. Chain successful hits to build combos and maximize your score!

description_text: Defend your tower from zombies attacking from BOTH sides! Manage your energy wisely - shooting costs energy but it regenerates over time. Build combos by quickly killing zombies to multiply your score. Collect power-ups for health, energy, and damage boosts. Control your firing angle to hit enemies perfectly!

description_text: Navigate the red bus through a congested parking lot by sliding vehicles out of the way. Each vehicle can only move along its orientation (horizontal or vertical). Clear a path to the exit on the right side of the grid. Progress through increasingly challenging puzzles with more vehicles and tighter spaces. Can you master all levels?

Controls: Arrow Keys: Move your SOUL (red heart) to dodge attacks in battle / Navigate menu options | Z Key: Confirm menu selection / Advance dialogue | Space: Quick dodge (short cooldown) | Enter: Start game from main menu | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Return to start screen from game over
description_text: You are a human who has fallen into the Underground, a world filled with monsters. Navigate through encounters with various monsters, but remember - you don't have to fight! Use the unique battle system to SPARE enemies by completing dialogue choices and dodging their attacks. Survive three monster encounters and escape to win. Each battle features timing-based dodging mechanics where you must avoid projectiles. Choose wisely: FIGHT deals damage, ACT opens mercy options, and SPARE lets enemies go when conditions are met.

control_text: Arrow Keys / WASD: Waddle (Move) | Shift (hold): Run | Space: HONK! (Startles the gardener) | Z: Grab / Drop item (Interact) | Enter: Start Game | Escape: Pause / Resume | R: Restart (Game Over screens)
ARROWS: Move/Aim | SPACE: Jump | Z: Mine/Place/Attack | SHIFT: Cycle Items | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Explore a procedurally generated world. Mine resources, craft defenses, and find the buried Blue Core to win. Watch out for zombies!

control_text: Use WASD to Move, ARROWS to Look. Z to Place, SHIFT to Cycle Tool.
description_text: Use WASD to Move, ARROWS to Look. Z to Place, SHIFT to Cycle Tool.

control_text: Arrow Keys / WASD: Move your character | Space: Jump | Z: Cast Line / Hook / Reel In (Hold during mini-game) | Shift: Sprint | Enter: Start Game | Esc: Pause / Resume | R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally | Space: Jump | Z: Shift between Material World and Energy World | Enter: Start game from start screen | ESC: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart and return to start screen

Arrow Keys: Move in 8 directions (Up, Down, Left, Right, and diagonals) | Space: Fire your weapon | Shift: Activate special ability (Dash forward) | Enter: Start game / Confirm menu selections | Esc: Pause / Unpause game | R: Restart (return to start screen)
Controls: Arrow Keys: Steer | Space: Speed Boost | Z: Magnet | ENTER: Start | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
description_text: Control a hungry worm in a competitive arena, growing larger by consuming colorful food pellets scattered across the map. Eliminate opponents by making them crash into your body, then feast on their remains. Collect power-ups for temporary abilities like speed boosts and food magnets. Survive as long as possible while climbing the leaderboard to become the largest worm in the arena!

control_text: Space/Arrows to turn. Don't fall off.
Controls: ↑↓ Navigate choices | SPACE Select choice | Z Quick-select | ENTER Start | ESC Pause | R Restart
